what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only attachment record in YAML frontmatter that declares an attachment identifier, its channel, an attachment_type of board_items, a target board://item-d2b39deb, and an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The id att-62016b3e matches the filename stem.
The target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-d2b39deb.
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
standouts: Target expressed as a board:// URI (board://item-d2b39deb).
Attachment typed as board_items with no payload or content in the file.
conventions: YAML frontmatter with a stable id matching the filename.
Use of a URI-scheme target to reference a board item.
ISO 8601 timestamp for the added field.
concerns: No body or payload is present, so the attachment's actual content is not stored here.
No author, editor, or modification history is recorded.
notes: A channel-memory attachment stub that links att-62016b3e to board item d2b39deb in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is the nature of board://item-d2b39deb?
Does board_items imply a schema, category, or rendering rule?
Why is the attachment payload absent from the file?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file is a typed link record that identifies an attachment and its target, and it contains exactly that metadata.
intention_signals: The file appears intended to register a persistent, typed reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item so it can be located, listed, or audited later.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a board item, preserving channel context and a stable target reference for retrieval or provenance.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record identifying att-62016b3e as a board_items attachment targeting board://item-d2b39deb in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
